title: phlox carolina var. altissima
intro: Phlox carolina var. altissima, also known as tall Carolina phlox, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States and a variety of the Phlox carolina species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlox carolina var. altissima include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine as a poultice to treat various ailments.
